review_notes: Browser review 2026-05-28: GptForge is a standalone generative AI product site with Home, Features, Demo, Pricing, Contact, and Get Started navigation plus product marketing copy. It is not a directory listing surface.

Official site review 2026-05-28: iBuildNew is a property and home-building comparison marketplace focused on Australian new homes, land estates, and house packages. It is not a software or startup directory listing surface for this campaign.

Browser review 2026-05-28: IndiaMART is a real supplier and manufacturer directory, but this review hit anti-bot/rate-limit barriers including CAPTCHA/429 and did not expose a safe anonymous submission flow for automation. Keep out of anonymous automation as assisted/manual flow.

Browser and HTTP review 2026-05-28: IndieHacker.tools is a real indie tools directory. The homepage exposes LIST TOOL and the public submit path https://www.indiehacker.tools/list-indie-tool, which offers free listing options and then loads a public Tally submission form via https://www.indiehacker.tools/list. Approve as a directory target.

Browser review 2026-05-28: IndieHustles is a real indie SaaS alternatives directory. The site exposes a public Submit page at https://indiehustles.com/submit with visible founder and product fields plus a free Standard review option at $0, even though a paid priority option is preselected by default. Approve as a directory target.
